texts: It was the <%= year %> year since the beginning of the colonization of Europa...
Somewhere on Jupiter's moon Europa, <%= year %> years after colonization...

<%= year %> years ago, humankind first set foot on Europa.
Who could have imagined what a huge mistake it would be?
There's no turning back now, and there never will be.
Like all those abandoned here, a cold death and eternal incorruptibility await you.
Try to delay that moment.
<%= year %> years ago, Europa was conquered by humanity.

You woke up after a powerful explosion, thrown 400 meters, and are only alive thanks to the low gravity.
Everything around you is buried in snow.
Are there any other survivors?

Several years ago, you hijacked a space shuttle and fled to Europa, far from Earthly justice.
Rumors swirled that you were wanted on Earth for a similar crime.
You didn't reveal much about yourself.
When you were found, all you had on you was a fragment of a fake passport
with part of the name 'Dan C...' visible on it, along with several bundles of marked bills.
Why do you need them on Europa?
It doesn't matter now - 
Earthly affairs remain on Earth.

You're a Colonial Police officer.
Several Great Red Spots ago, you became separated from your fellow soldiers and lost in the icy wasteland.
How can you navigate this frozen valley of death?

Several years ago, you were finally accepted into the Western Colonization Community (WCC)
to conduct thermonuclear experiments.
This was the first step toward the terraforming of Europa.
And one of the last steps in the colony's life.

Jupiter shows the Great Red Spots,
a monstrous storm swept everything around,
but you miraculously survived
